column1: I hadn't enough cash and I _____ pay by cheque.
British pupils _____ stay at school till the age of 16.
I was lost and _____ ask the policeman the way.
The buses were all full; I _____ get a taxi.
The chambermaids usually _____ do a lot of work.
It is very slippery outside; it _____ have snowed in the night.
I _____ leave home at 7 a.m. not to be late for my job.
